charter.mission: Freeze the objective tracks, no-leak boundaries, model-zoo search scope, marginal-value stopping rule, and output format for downstream CPO portfolio experiments.
in_scope: stopping rules based on marginal improvement
required portfolio charts and process output
success_criteria: the project has explicit objective tracks instead of vague performance goals
oracle upper bound and no-leak tracks are separated cleanly
model-zoo exploration has a hard stopping rule

interpretation: V1.12BC exists to prevent black-box expansion from turning into uncontrolled search.
The phase freezes objective tracks before any broader portfolio experiment opens.
